notes: Net-log capture (Chromium). browser-use could not launch its managed browser on this headless host; captured via Chromium --log-net-log instead. Frontend uses a same-origin /api proxy; public api.municode.com serves the same data unauthenticated and is the CLI target. Full-text /search is a paid MuniPro feature: HasMuniproSearch=false, frontend /api/search=401, public /search returns NumberOfHits:0 for free tier.
